text:
Alice Finot had a day to remember on Tuesday as she broke the European record in the 3000m steeplechase and then immediately proposed to her partner who was in the stands at the Stade de France.

The French star missed out on a medal as she finished fourth but it was an immense performance from her, setting a personal best and the fastest time ever by a European in the women’s race.

After celebrating on the track Finot headed over to the stands where her partner was waiting and Bruno Martínez Bargiela had the surprise of his life.

Finot got down on one knee and asked her boyfriend to marry her, presenting a pin rather than a ring and she explained why afterwards.

Follow all the action from Paris 2024 on our live Olympics blog.

‘I told myself that if I ran under nine minutes, knowing that nine is my lucky number and that we’ve been together for nine years, then I would propose,’ Finot said, having cross the line in eight minutes and 58.67seconds.

‘I don’t like doing things like everyone else. Since he hadn’t done it yet, I told myself that maybe it was up to me to do it. So, I gave a pin that I ran with to my boyfriend. On it, it says: “Love is in Paris.”

‘He’s the one who always gives me strength and if I managed to get under nine minutes, that meant a lot.’

Thankfully for the sake of Finot and to avoid the most awkward moment in Olympic history, Martínez Bargiela said yes and completed a great day for the Frenchwoman.

Of her performance on the track, she said: ‘I really had a blast, I managed to express myself.

‘It was just a tiny bit (that was) missing to get a medal, I’m sorry. But I don’t regret anything.’

Bahrain’s Winfred Yavi won the gold with an Olympic record time of 8:52.76, ahead of Uganda’s Peruth Chemutai who took silver and Kenya’s Faith Cherotich with bronze.

title: Olympics star smashes European record and immediately proposes to partner in Paris | Metro News
description: Love was in the air in Paris as one French athlete set a European record on the track and then ran over to propose to her boyfriend!
